meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't collaborate (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't collaborate. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template to Solve Collaboration
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with client collaboration. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code to standardize workflows and ship high-quality SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: Collaboration bottlenecks occur when project state is fragmented. The Antigravity template centralizes your architecture, state definitions, and documentation into a single, LLM-readable source of truth. By combining this with Claude Code, you automate the synchronization between your local codebase and client-facing requirements, ensuring consistency across every build.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is pinging you on Slack, and your codebase has become a graveyard of disconnected files and forgotten context. You’re trapped in a silo, unable to share progress because your environment isn't built for visibility. Collaboration isn't just about code; it's about context, and without a standardized structure, you're just writing technical debt.

Enter the Antigravity project template. It’s the architectural blueprint that transforms a chaotic folder into a self-documenting, collaborative powerhouse. By leveraging this template alongside Claude Code, you don't just build faster—you create a transparent, professional workflow that makes you indispensable to your clients.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure that forces modularity and makes your project instantly navigable for both you and your AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project structure focusing on modular SaaS architecture with clear separation between core logic, API interfaces, and documentation assets.

steps.title: Configure the Contextual Knowledge Base
steps.description: Populate the .antigravity/context directory to ensure your AI understands project constraints, client preferences, and style guides before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project requirements and generate a comprehensive .antigravity/context/project_spec.md file that defines our technical constraints and coding standards.

steps.title: Automate Synchronized Documentation
steps.description: Use the template to force-generate documentation updates whenever a new feature branch is merged, keeping the client in the loop without extra work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated hook that parses code changes and updates the README.md and API-docs.md files within the Antigravity project structure.

steps.title: Implement Agent-Driven Code Reviews
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to audit your own work against the Antigravity template standards, ensuring your code remains production-ready and consistent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase against the architectural standards defined in our Antigravity template and suggest refactorings for better modularity.

steps.title: Deploy the Client-Facing Dashboard
steps.description: Generate a lightweight status dashboard from the template metadata, giving your client a window into your progress without needing access to your terminal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Extract project status from the Antigravity metadata and build a static status dashboard for client transparency.

pro_tips: Use git-hooks to trigger Claude Code audits on every commit to prevent drift from your template standards.
Map your client's Slack channel as a context source in Antigravity to keep the AI aware of evolving project requirements.
Always define a 'source of truth' file in the root directory that the AI must reference before modifying any business logic.
Use custom Antigravity aliases to shorten complex Claude Code commands into single-word CLI triggers.
Treat your project documentation as code—if it's not in the template, it doesn't exist for the AI.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, schedule a 15-minute demo with your client to show them the new status dashboard. Once they see the transparency and speed, use that momentum to upsell a recurring maintenance package.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building a high-velocity freelance business. The Antigravity template is the bridge between chaotic coding and professional, scalable SaaS delivery. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
